projectDescription: A hands-on 90-minute workshop teaching developers how to build production-ready durable AI agents using the OpenAI Agents SDK and Temporal, running entirely in GitHub Codespaces.
keyFeatures: OpenAI Agents SDK integration with tool calling and handoff patterns
Temporal workflows and activities for durable AI agent execution
Automatic retries and state persistence across crashes
Multi-agent routing with language-specific specialist agents
Full observability via Temporal Web UI and OpenAI traces
Zero local setup — runs entirely in GitHub Codespaces
Progressive learning path from basic agents to production patterns
Complete solutions and homework exercise starters included
publicApiSurface: Agent (openai-agents) — create an AI agent with instructions and tools
Runner.run() — execute an agent with a user query
@function_tool — decorator to expose Python functions as agent tools
handoffs — list of specialist agents a triage agent can delegate to
workflow.execute_activity() — call an activity from within a workflow
OpenAIAgentsPlugin — Temporal plugin for OpenAI Agents SDK integration
Worker — poll and execute workflow/activity tasks
make setup / make env / make lint / make test / make temporal-up
